mission.title: opentofu: website: Split installation instructions
mission.description:
This change splits the installation instructions into separate pages and provides manual installation instructions for the OS packages.

Resolves #878
Resolves #879

## Preview

![Screenshot of the OpenTofu website, detailing the various installation methods on the left in menu as well as in the main page.](https://github.com/opentofu/opentofu/assets/86970079/c7381f24-0d93-40c4-8864-486855ad60f1)

resolution.summary: This PR adds the [`raw-loader`](https://v4.webpack.js.org/loaders/raw-loader/) package to support including raw files (such as scripts) in the documentation.
steps: Review the issue discussion for context
Apply the fix from the linked pull request
